# === CROSS-REFERENCE REPLACEMENTS \(order: most specific first\) ===
# Format: old wikilink path/name -> new wikilink path/name
ref_replacements = [
    # Part III renumbers
    \("03-incremental-patterns/0316-hybrid-append-merge", "04-load-strategies/0405-hybrid-append-merge"\),
    \("03-incremental-patterns/0315-append-and-materialize", "04-load-strategies/0404-append-and-materialize"\),
    \("03-incremental-patterns/0314-create-vs-update-separation", "03-incremental-patterns/0310-create-vs-update-separation"\),
    \("03-incremental-patterns/0313-incremental-with-lookback", "03-incremental-patterns/0313-incremental-with-lookback"\),  # delete later
    \("03-incremental-patterns/0312-late-arriving-data", "03-incremental-patterns/0309-late-arriving-data"\),
    \("03-incremental-patterns/0311-detail-without-timestamp", "03-incremental-patterns/0308-detail-without-timestamp"\),
    \("03-incremental-patterns/0310-open-closed-documents", "03-incremental-patterns/0307-open-closed-documents"\),
    \("03-incremental-patterns/0309-hard-delete-detection", "03-incremental-patterns/0306-hard-delete-detection"\),
    \("03-incremental-patterns/0308-reliable-incrementals", "04-load-strategies/0406-reliable-loads"\),
    \("03-incremental-patterns/0307-merge-upsert", "04-load-strategies/0403-merge-upsert"\),
    \("03-incremental-patterns/0306-append-only", "04-load-strategies/0402-append-only"\),

    # Part I new entry
    \("05-failure-patterns/0501-idempotency", "01-foundations-and-archetypes/0109-idempotency"\),

    # Part IV conforming -> Part V
    \("04-conforming-playbook/0409-nested-data-and-json", "05-conforming-playbook/0509-nested-data-and-json"\),
    \("04-conforming-playbook/0408-decimal-precision-loss", "05-conforming-playbook/0508-decimal-precision-loss"\),
    \("04-conforming-playbook/0407-boolean-representations", "05-conforming-playbook/0507-boolean-representations"\),
    \("04-conforming-playbook/0406-charset-encoding", "05-conforming-playbook/0506-charset-encoding"\),
    \("04-conforming-playbook/0405-timezone-conforming", "05-conforming-playbook/0505-timezone-conforming"\),
    \("04-conforming-playbook/0404-null-handling", "05-conforming-playbook/0504-null-handling"\),
    \("04-conforming-playbook/0403-type-casting-normalization", "05-conforming-playbook/0503-type-casting-normalization"\),
    \("04-conforming-playbook/0402-synthetic-keys", "05-conforming-playbook/0502-synthetic-keys"\),
    \("04-conforming-playbook/0401-metadata-column-injection", "05-conforming-playbook/0501-metadata-column-injection"\),

    # Part V failure -> Part VI
    \("05-failure-patterns/0507-recovery-from-corruption", "06-operating-the-pipeline/0614-recovery-from-corruption"\),
    \("05-failure-patterns/0506-reconciliation-patterns", "06-operating-the-pipeline/0613-reconciliation-patterns"\),
    \("05-failure-patterns/0505-duplicate-detection", "06-operating-the-pipeline/0612-duplicate-detection"\),
    \("05-failure-patterns/0504-partial-failure-recovery", "06-operating-the-pipeline/0611-partial-failure-recovery"\),
    \("05-failure-patterns/0503-backfill-strategies", "06-operating-the-pipeline/0610-backfill-strategies"\),

    \("07-operational-patterns/0707-alerting-and-notifications", "06-operating-the-pipeline/0604-alerting-and-notifications"\),

    \("07-operational-patterns/0704-cost-monitoring", "06-operating-the-pipeline/0602-cost-monitoring"\),

    \("07-operational-patterns/0702-source-system-etiquette", "06-operating-the-pipeline/0606-source-system-etiquette"\),

    \("06-serving-the-destination/0603-pre-built-views", "07-serving-the-destination/0703-pre-built-views"\),
    \("06-serving-the-destination/0602-partitioning-for-consumers", "07-serving-the-destination/0702-partitioning-for-consumers"\),
    \("06-serving-the-destination/0601-dont-pre-aggregate", "07-serving-the-destination/0701-dont-pre-aggregate"\),
]

# Also build short-form display replacements from the ref_replacements
# e.g., |0309-hard-delete-detection]] -> |0306-hard-delete-detection]]
short_replacements = []
for old, new in ref_replacements:
    old_name = old.split\("/"\)[1]
    new_name = new.split\("/"\)[1]
    if old_name != new_name:
        short_replacements.append\(\("|" + old_name + "]]", "|" + new_name + "]]"\)\)
        # Also handle number-only display like |0309]]
        old_num = old_name[:4]
        new_num = new_name[:4]
        if old_num != new_num:
            short_replacements.append\(\("|" + old_num + "]]", "|" + new_num + "]]"\)\)

all_replacements = ref_replacements + short_replacements

# === STEP 1: Create new directories ===
new_dirs = [
    "04-load-strategies",
    "05-conforming-playbook",
    "06-operating-the-pipeline",
    "07-serving-the-destination",
]
for d in new_dirs:
    p = os.path.join\(root, d\)
    os.makedirs\(p, exist_ok=True\)

# === STEP 2: Read all .md files, apply cross-reference replacements ===
all_files = {}
for dirpath, _, filenames in os.walk\(root\):
    for fn in filenames:
        if fn.endswith\('.md'\):
            fp = os.path.join\(dirpath, fn\)
            rel = os.path.relpath\(fp, root\).replace\("\\\\", "/"\)
            content = open\(fp, encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)
            for old, new in all_replacements:
                content = content.replace\(old, new\)
            all_files[rel] = content

# === STEP 3: Execute file moves ===
moved = 0
for old_rel, new_rel in moves:
    old_abs = os.path.join\(root, old_rel.replace\("/", "\\\\"\)\)
    new_abs = os.path.join\(root, new_rel.replace\("/", "\\\\"\)\)
    if os.path.exists\(old_abs\):
        # Write updated content to new location
        content = all_files.get\(old_rel, open\(old_abs, encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\)
        os.makedirs\(os.path.dirname\(new_abs\), exist_ok=True\)
        open\(new_abs, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\).write\(content\)
        os.remove\(old_abs\)
        moved += 1

# === STEP 4: Write updated content for files that stayed in place ===
updated = 0
for rel, content in all_files.items\(\):
    fp = os.path.join\(root, rel.replace\("/", "\\\\"\)\)
    if os.path.exists\(fp\):
        original = open\(fp, encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)
        if content != original:
            open\(fp, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\).write\(content\)
            updated += 1

# === STEP 5: Delete 0313-incremental-with-lookback \(merged stub\) ===
stub = os.path.join\(root, "03-incremental-patterns", "0313-incremental-with-lookback.md"\)
if os.path.exists\(stub\):
    os.remove\(stub\)

# === STEP 6: Clean up old empty directories ===
for old_dir in ["04-conforming-playbook", "05-failure-patterns", "07-operational-patterns", "06-serving-the-destination"]:
    p = os.path.join\(root, old_dir\)
    if os.path.exists\(p\):
        remaining = [f for f in os.listdir\(p\) if f != '.gitkeep']
        if not remaining:
            shutil.rmtree\(p\)

print\(str\(moved\) + " files moved"\)
print\(str\(updated\) + " files updated \(cross-refs\)"\)

# Verify final state
for d in sorted\(os.listdir\(root\)\):
    dp = os.path.join\(root, d\)
    if os.path.isdir\(dp\) and not d.startswith\('.'\) and not d.startswith\('_'\):
        files = sorted\([f for f in os.listdir\(dp\) if f.endswith\('.md'\)]\)
        print\("\\n" + d + "/ \(" + str\(len\(files\)\) + " files\)"\)
        for f in files:
            print\("  " + f\)
PYEOF)
